title: Audit every Zephyr board boot result
description: Reconcile all production/sample/diagnostic board fragments against actual Zephyr board definitions and runtime backends. Attempt valid executable Renode/QEMU/native targets; explicitly bead every stale, orphaned, unmodeled, or hardware-only target as FAIL/BLOCKED with remediation requirements.
acceptance_criteria: 1. No declared board fragment is omitted. 2. Valid executable backends have runtime results, not build-only claims. 3. tbeam_supreme, stale t_echo_nrf52840/nrf52840_lichen selectors, contradictory RAK4631 status, and legacy bridge fragments are resolved or linked to explicit issues. 4. Result counts reconcile exactly with the canonical manifest.
notes:
AUDIT at base revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364. ROOT RECONCILIATION: 42 firmware roots total = 39 roots with at least one accepted runtime WIN and 3 BLOCKED roots. The 39 WIN roots are 35 passing lichen/tests roots plus bridge-zephyr, gateway, puck, and lora_ping. BLOCKED roots are app_identity (project-LICHEN-b9od), ping_l2 (project-LICHEN-35qo), and physical-only test_blink (project-LICHEN-902l). TEST SCENARIOS: lichen/tests/* contains exactly 62 runtime scenarios: 60 WIN, 2 BLOCKED (one each app_identity/ping_l2). Gateway sample.yaml adds 2 separate build-only scenarios; they are not runtime tests and are excluded from the 62 denominator. Runtime-platform denominator correction: 137 unique scenario/allowed-platform pairs; the 97 integration_platform entries are a subset of those 137, so prior prose count 234 double-counted them. PRODUCTION/SAMPLE BACKEND ROWS: 42 recorded rows = 9 WIN, 11 FAIL, 22 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 rows: 2 WIN (native_sim executed as native_sim/native/64 host qualifier; qemu_x86), 10 FAIL legacy/unmapped fragments under 2u26, 4 BLOCKED canonical hardware targets under k8o1. Gateway 10: 2 WIN (native64, qemu), 8 BLOCKED (native32 under o4yi plus 7 boards under n39k). Puck 11: 2 WIN (native64, T-Echo), 1 FAIL tbeam_supreme under w8rd, 8 BLOCKED (native32 under o4yi plus 7 boards under v9qz). lora_ping 4: 3 WIN T-Echo/RAK4631/Nucleo and 1 BLOCKED T1000-E under sr55. test_blink 1 BLOCKED under 902l. FRAGMENT INVENTORY: bridge 14 stems/28 files, 4 canonical and 10 stale; gateway 12 stems/22 files representing 10 target selectors plus 2 optional T-Deck validation overlays that are not targets; puck 11 stems/22 files representing 10 valid targets plus stale tbeam_supreme; test_blink 1 stem/1 file; lora_ping 3 stems/4 files plus fragmentless Nucleo backend. Generic Heltec/T-Deck Renode board models are not declared lora_ping backends; they are classified only for apps that declare those boards. Nucleo lora_ping is explicitly fragmentless external Renode backend. RAK status is app-specific and noncontradictory: lora_ping WIN; bridge/puck/gateway remain BLOCKED pending their own runtime evidence. SELECTORS: flattened stems are valid auto-merge names, but command selectors must use slash-qualified HWMv2 names. nrf52840_lichen and command-line t_echo_nrf52840 are stale and explicitly tracked by updated project-LICHEN-xy79. Bridge generic native_sim has one declared path; native_sim/native/64 is its required ARM host qualifier, not an additional omitted 32-bit row. All FAIL/BLOCKED rows have concrete active remediation Beads. Superseding notes govern provisional contradictions: gateway native32 uses o4yi, and puck native64 final status is WIN.
AUDIT ERRATA after three independent reviews: current scoped metadata, which governs the final result set, has 138 unique scenario/platform_allow pairs and 98 integration_platform pairs; the prior 137/97 values apply only to base 8e02a7a before native_sim/native/64 was added to lichen/tests/icmpv6/testcase.yaml. All 98 integration pairs are subsets of the 138 allowed pairs. RAK4631 reconciliation is app-specific: lora_ping WIN while bridge and puck are BLOCKED; gateway has no RAK4631 target or row. Stale-selector remediation project-LICHEN-xy79 now covers workflows, scripts, and docs, not only CI. PROVENANCE QUALIFICATION: results use base 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 plus scoped uncommitted changes described by child Beads; base alone is not the complete source identity. Final reproducibility requires a committed revision containing those scoped changes. EVIDENCE REVIEW GAPS: lora_ping UART/connection logs remain retained, but harness stdout proving independent transmissions was not retained; rerun is required. Seven remediated test reports cited by m5m1.5 are retained on the ARM EBS according to that Bead but absent locally. BACKEND REVIEW GAP: six rows currently marked BLOCKED have generic caller-supplied-ELF Renode scripts and must be attempted before final classification: bridge T-Echo/RAK4631; gateway T-Echo/Nucleo; puck RAK4631/Nucleo. Until these attempts and lora_ping evidence reruns complete, the 9 WIN/11 FAIL/22 BLOCKED backend aggregate is provisional and this issue remains open.
SUPERSEDING FINAL BACKEND RECONCILIATION after executing six previously BLOCKED caller-ELF Renode rows: 42 rows = 9 WIN, 17 FAIL, 16 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 = 2 WIN, 12 FAIL, 2 BLOCKED; T-Echo and RAK4631 are now FAIL with evidence in k8o1, while Heltec/T-Deck remain BLOCKED. Gateway 10 = 2 WIN, 2 FAIL, 6 BLOCKED; T-Echo and Nucleo are now FAIL with evidence in n39k, five hardware targets plus native32 remain BLOCKED. Puck 11 = 2 WIN, 3 FAIL, 6 BLOCKED; RAK4631 and Nucleo are now FAIL with evidence in v9qz, tbeam_supreme remains FAIL under w8rd, five hardware targets plus native32 remain BLOCKED. lora_ping remains 3 WIN/1 BLOCKED and test_blink remains 1 BLOCKED. Six-run and three-lora rerun evidence is under /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-nine-runs-20260716T1800Z; SHA256SUMS manifest SHA-256 8def11add29a6a5f43ed88d52712db88d53755170df7626e988b50bafbc66fd4; credential scan passed. SOURCE IDENTITY for current scoped local result tree: HEAD/base 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364; scoped 26-file tracked git diff --binary SHA-256 580f38281abd190ac44f36d3739888d618174e7f196ceae2b948fbc8874c2c8f; deterministic digest of eight scoped untracked source file SHA-256 entries 9a9761d536ab99a0dcadef0b69c0c75e416f43642cf595b9d82396b389f73fcb. The ARM report workspace has HEAD 8e02a7a and tracked diff d22f4eb7467bbb5955175c2e504137d1a1cd3d1fad779766a76d3ed5763bd8f8 plus five recorded untracked source hashes. Exact committed revision remains pending publication/commit, but all current source and evidence inputs now have deterministic identities.
SUPERSEDING CONVERGED BACKEND RECONCILIATION after all six Heltec/T-Deck app rows were attempted: 42 production/sample rows = 9 WIN, 23 FAIL, 10 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 = 2 WIN, 14 FAIL, 0 BLOCKED. Gateway 10 = 2 WIN, 4 FAIL, 4 BLOCKED. Puck 11 = 2 WIN, 5 FAIL, 4 BLOCKED. lora_ping 4 = 3 WIN, 0 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED. test_blink 1 = 0 WIN, 0 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED. Heltec/T-Deck bridge and gateway linked ELFs but failed runtime against the skeletal ESP32-S3 model; puck Heltec linked then failed runtime, while puck T-Deck failed compilation due missing CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP/header. Superseding evidence directory remains /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-nine-runs-20260716T1800Z. SHA256SUMS now covers 104 entries including the exact lora oracle harness (harness SHA-256 83fa61d38b6e86639999a4b4046a6826aabe5890e78ceaa12661da43bb02693c); manifest SHA-256 a49d5fd7b6a9d47f064f5d13fb6ffad902be5d2948f11d25274ee834ddb8c7ef; all entries verified and credential scan passed. EXACT TRACKED DIFF SCOPE for SHA-256 580f38281abd190ac44f36d3739888d618174e7f196ceae2b948fbc8874c2c8f is these 26 paths: lichen/apps/gateway/Kconfig; lichen/apps/puck/CMakeLists.txt; lichen/apps/puck/sections-ram.ld; lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/nrf52840_lichen.repl; lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.conf; lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.overlay; lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/nucleo_wl55jc_renode.overlay; lichen/samples/lora_ping/CMakeLists.txt; lichen/subsys/lichen/app_interface/hal_bridge.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/CMakeLists.txt; lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_msg.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_server.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/hal/hal.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lichen_l2.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.c; lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.h; lichen/tests/app_identity/prj.conf; lichen/tests/app_identity/src/main.c; lichen/tests/ble_ipsp_transport/src/main.c; lichen/tests/icmpv6/testcase.yaml; lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble/prj.conf; lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter/prj.conf; lichen/tests/ping_l2/prj.conf; lichen/tests/slip_transport/src/main.c. Recomputed locally with git diff --binary HEAD -- [paths] | shasum -a 256 and matched exactly.
CONCRETE FAILURE REMEDIATION: all 12 newly executed FAIL rows now map to defect-oriented Beads. nRF full-app startup failures across bridge/gateway/puck -> project-LICHEN-ynxn. Gateway/puck Nucleo radio device linkage -> project-LICHEN-mvrx. Bridge/gateway Heltec/T-Deck plus puck Heltec ESP32-S3 ELF/model execution and packaging -> project-LICHEN-cy6c. Puck T-Deck missing CoAP configuration -> project-LICHEN-57sn. Existing 11 FAIL rows remain covered by legacy bridge project-LICHEN-2u26 and tbeam_supreme project-LICHEN-w8rd.
FINAL TARGET-LEVEL CLASSIFICATION ERRATUM: five ESP32-S3 rows exercised only through a documented skeletal surrogate are target BLOCKED, while their emulator attempts are retained FAIL evidence. Authoritative 42-row aggregate is therefore 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 = 2 WIN, 12 FAIL, 2 BLOCKED (Heltec/T-Deck). Gateway 10 = 2 WIN, 2 FAIL, 6 BLOCKED (Heltec/T-Deck plus nRF52840 DK, T1000-E, R1 Neo, native32). Puck 11 = 2 WIN, 4 FAIL, 5 BLOCKED (Heltec plus T1000-E, R1 Neo, TTGO, native32). lora_ping 4 = 3 WIN/1 BLOCKED; test_blink 1 BLOCKED. Puck T-Deck canonical compile failure remains FAIL. SOURCE PROVENANCE ERRATUM: lora oracle runtime depends on modified python/src/lichen/sim/renode_server.py. Exact source fingerprint is now the previously enumerated 26 tracked paths plus python/src/lichen/sim/renode_server.py (27 paths), git diff --binary SHA-256 14c7c8ee5c770ab53aa822dd78e77b4f8b150f56a5d654bbf027313250d38741. Current renode_server.py SHA-256 32887822a9dfe25470e541a2e79a022c4c553046bb901a6f946899ce7cacb5ca versus HEAD content 11f3b86d71542dba3c3d1f9fa1db693649fb1a049935e6c34b289e3bb54300e6. Eight-untracked digest remains 9a9761d536ab99a0dcadef0b69c0c75e416f43642cf595b9d82396b389f73fcb. REMEDIATION ERRATA: mvrx now covers both canonical Nucleo puck CoAP config and radio linkage; xy79 acceptance now covers all known active stale/nonexistent selectors including RAK4631, Heltec, and T-Beam forms.
FINAL ROOT TAXONOMY ERRATUM: app_identity and ping_l2 are FAIL because valid executable backends were attempted and crashed reproducibly; they are not blocked by unavailable capability. Authoritative 42-root result is 39 WIN, 2 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED. The sole BLOCKED root is physical-only T1000-E test_blink under 902l. Authoritative test-scenario result is 60 WIN, 2 FAIL, 0 BLOCKED. Production/sample target-row result remains unchanged at 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED.
close_reason: Corrected root taxonomy and independently reviewed: 42 roots = 39 WIN, 2 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED; production target matrix remains 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED.
